forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '80'
+title: Adopt FoundationModelsExtras DotfolderStack for ShellPolicy config path resolution
+---
+## What
+
+Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`).
+
+**Files to modify:**
+- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
+- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
+  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
+  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)` and derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"`, and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (project default stays `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, but pass its result to the stack as `workingDirectory`).
+  - Update the header comment (layer description) to name `DotfolderStack` as the resolver.
+- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).
+
+**Deliberate constraints (preserve behavior):**
+- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
+- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
+- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
+- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior.
+
+**Subtasks:**
+- [ ] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
+- [ ] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
+- [ ] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to reference `DotfolderStack` (keep doc coverage green)
+- [ ] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults
+- [ ] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
+- [ ] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` still resolves to `~/.shell/config.yaml` and `defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree)
+- [ ] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
+- [ ] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
+- [ ] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromDotfolderStack` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".shell/config.yaml")` — proving the stack-derived path is identical to the previous behavior
+- [ ] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
+- [ ] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

 ## What

-Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`).
+Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).
+
+**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

 **Files to modify:**
 - `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
 - `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
   - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
-  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)` and derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"`, and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (project default stays `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, but pass its result to the stack as `workingDirectory`).
-  - Update the header comment (layer description) to name `DotfolderStack` as the resolver.
+  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
+  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
 - `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

-**Deliberate constraints (preserve behavior):**
+**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
 - Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
 - Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
 - Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
-- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior.
+- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
+- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.

 **Subtasks:**
 - [ ] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
 - [ ] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
-- [ ] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to reference `DotfolderStack` (keep doc coverage green)
-- [ ] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults
+- [ ] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
+- [ ] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
 - [ ] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
-- [ ] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` still resolves to `~/.shell/config.yaml` and `defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree)
+- [ ] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
+- [ ] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
+- [ ] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
 - [ ] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
 - [ ] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
 - [ ] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

+- [ ] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack
+- [ ] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add a case proving an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override is honored (construct the underlying `DotfolderStack` directly with a fake environment dictionary, since `ShellPolicy`'s own `init` takes no `environment:` parameter — assert the `.user` layer root equals `<XDG_CONFIG_HOME>/shell`)
 - [ ] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
 - [ ] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing

--- original

 title: Adopt FoundationModelsExtras DotfolderStack for ShellPolicy config path resolution
 ---
-## What
-
-Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).
-
-**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.
-
-**Files to modify:**
-- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
-- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
-  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
-  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
-  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
-- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).
-
-**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
-- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
-- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
-- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
-- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
-- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.
-
-**Subtasks:**
-- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
-- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
-- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
-- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
-- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate
-
-## Acceptance Criteria
-
-- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
-- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution

+## What
+
+Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).
+
+**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.
+
+**Files to modify:**
+- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
+- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
+  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
+  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
+  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
+- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).
+
+**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
+- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
+- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
+- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
+- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
+- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.
+
+**Subtasks:**
+- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
+- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
+- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
+- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
+- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
+- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
+- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
+- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
+- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
+- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)
+
+## Tests
+
+- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack
+- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add a case proving an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override is honored (construct the underlying `DotfolderStack` directly with a fake environment dictionary, since `ShellPolicy`'s own `init` takes no `environment:` parameter — assert the `.user` layer root equals `<XDG_CONFIG_HOME>/shell`)
+- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
+- [x] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing

 title: Adopt FoundationModelsExtras DotfolderStack for ShellPolicy config path resolution
 ---
-## What

Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).

**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.

**Subtasks:**
- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

## Tests

- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add a case proving an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override is honored (construct the underlying `DotfolderStack` directly with a fake environment dictionary, since `ShellPolicy`'s own `init` takes no `environment:` parameter — assert the `.user` layer root equals `<XDG_CONFIG_HOME>/shell`)
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
- [x] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

## Review Findings (2026-07-20 08:54)

Scope: `HEAD~1..HEAD` (commit `4dee31d`)

- [x] `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift:190` — Public function `check(command:)` has a parameter `command` but does not document it in the doc comment. Add `- Parameter command: the shell command string to validate.` (or similar).
- [x] `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift:221` — Public function `check(environment:)` has a parameter `environment` but does not document it in the doc comment. Add `- Parameter environment: a map of environment variable names to values.` (or similar).
- [x] `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift:240` — Public function `check(workingDirectory:)` has a parameter `path` but does not document it in the doc comment. Add `- Parameter path: the working directory path string to validate.` (or similar).

Note: a fourth engine finding (label-omission on the pre-existing test helper `writeConfig(_:)` in `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`) was dropped — it asks to refactor test code that already existed before this commit, which the review process excludes by blanket policy.

+## What

Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).

**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.

**Subtasks:**
- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

## Tests

- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack

It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.

+## What
+
+Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).
+
+**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.
+
+**Files to modify:**
+- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
+- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
+  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
+  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
+  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
+- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).
+
+**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
+- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
+- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
+- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
+- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
+- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.
+
+**Subtasks:**
+- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
+- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
+- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
+- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
+- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+

+- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
+- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
+- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
+- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
+- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

+Scope: `HEAD~1..HEAD` (commit `7acba2e2daa025bf0e45e94bb67809d10b79a99f`)

+
+- [ ] `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift:313` — defaultUserConfigURL() and defaultProjectConfigURL() contain nearly identical logic: both create a DotfolderStack, find a specific layer by source, and return the config file path. The only differences are how the working directory is obtained and which layer source is matched. This duplicated pattern will drift if maintained separately. Extract a shared private static helper function like `configURL(layerSource:workingDirectory:)` that takes the layer source and working directory as parameters, eliminating the duplicated DotfolderStack and layer-finding logic.

 title: Adopt FoundationModelsExtras DotfolderStack for ShellPolicy config path resolution
 ---
-## What

Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).

**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.

**Subtasks:**
- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

## Tests

- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add a case proving an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override is honored (construct the underlying `DotfolderStack` directly with a fake environment dictionary, since `ShellPolicy`'s own `init` takes no `environment:` parameter — assert the `.user` layer root equals `<XDG_CONFIG_HOME>/shell`)
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
- [x] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

## Review Findings (2026-07-20 08:54)

Scope: `HEAD~1..HEAD` (commit `4dee31d`)

- [x] `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift:190` — Public function `check(command:)` has a parameter `command` but does not document it in the doc comment. Add `- Parameter command: the shell command string to validate.` (or similar).
- [x] `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift:221` — Public function `check(environment:)` has a parameter `environment` but does not document it in the doc comment. Add `- Parameter environment: a map of environment variable names to values.` (or similar).
- [x] `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift:240` — Public function `check(workingDirectory:)` has a parameter `path` but does not document it in the doc comment. Add `- Parameter path: the working directory path string to validate.` (or similar).

Note: a fourth engine finding (label-omission on the pre-existing test helper `writeConfig(_:)` in `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`) was dropped — it asks to refactor test code that already existed before this commit, which the review process excludes by blanket policy.

Example: `/// - Returns: the user-layer config file URL, or `nil` if unset or not an absolute path.`.

-## What

Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).

**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.

**Subtasks:**
- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

## Tests

- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add a case proving an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override is honored (construct the underlying `DotfolderStack` directly with a fake environment dictionary, since `ShellPolicy`'s own `init` takes no `environment:` parameter — assert the `.user` layer root equals `<XDG_CONFIG_HOME>/shell`)
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
- [x] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing

-## What

Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).

**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.

**Subtasks:**
- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

## Tests

- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add a case proving an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override is honored (construct the underlying `DotfolderStack` directly with a fake environment dictionary, since `ShellPolicy`'s own `init` takes no `environment:` parameter — assert the `.user` layer root equals `<XDG_CONFIG_HOME>/shell`)
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
- [x] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing

-## What

Replace `ShellPolicy`'s hand-rolled dotfolder path resolution with the family-shared `DotfolderStack` from the `FoundationModelsExtras` package (`/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras`, `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras/DotfolderStack.swift`, currently at `d8165ba`).

**Behavior change from `d8165ba` ("switch user layer to XDG config directory"):** `DotfolderStack`'s `.user` layer no longer roots at `~/.<name>/`. It now roots at `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/<name>/` (bare name, no leading dot), falling back to `~/.config/<name>/` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset or not an absolute path. This is a real, user-visible change: `ShellPolicy`'s user-layer default moves from `~/.shell/config.yaml` to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` (or `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml`). The `.project` layer is untouched — still `<workingDirectory>/.shell/`.

**Files to modify:**
- `Package.swift` — add the package dependency, mirroring the existing `FoundationModelsOperationTool` entry style: `.package(url: "git@github.com:swissarmyhammer/FoundationModelsExtras.git", branch: "main")`, and add `.product(name: "FoundationModelsExtras", package: "FoundationModelsExtras")` to the `ShellTool` target.
- `Sources/ShellTool/ShellPolicy.swift` — rewire the default-path helpers to derive from a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`:
  - Delete the private `shellConfigFileName` constant and the hand-rolled path composition in `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()`.
  - Build a `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", workingDirectory: <git root, falling back to cwd>, defaultsDirectory: nil)`. Derive the user-layer default URL from the stack's `.user` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (now XDG-based — `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` by default, respecting `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`), and the project-layer default URL from the `.project` layer root + `"config.yaml"` (still `nil` when not inside a git working tree — keep the existing git-root walk, pass its result as the stack's `workingDirectory`).
  - Update the file-header comment (`ShellPolicy.swift:1-25`, the "Three layers... 2. User — `~/.shell/config.yaml`" description) and the `defaultUserConfigURL()` doc comment to describe the XDG location, not `~/.shell/config.yaml`.
- `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift` — add coverage for the new resolution (see Tests).

**Deliberate constraints (preserve where the underlying stack allows):**
- Keep the public `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)` signature unchanged — it is the injection seam used by ~20 call sites across 6 test files (`ShellPolicyTests`, `CLIConvergenceTests`, `HistoryOpsTests`, `ExecuteCommandTests`, `ProcessOpsTests`, `FusionTests`); none of those should need edits.
- Keep the embedded `builtinYAML` as the lowest layer with `defaultsDirectory: nil` — `DotfolderStack.Source.defaults` requires a real on-disk directory ("never compiled-in content"), and the compiled-in catastrophic-mistake deny list must stay unconditionally present.
- Keep merge semantics in `loadConfig()` untouched — `DotfolderStack` only locates files; key-level merging is documented as a consumer concern.
- Project layer continues to root at the nearest enclosing git working tree (passed as the stack's `workingDirectory`), matching current `defaultProjectConfigURL()` behavior — this layer is unaffected by the XDG change.
- Do **not** add a migration/fallback that also checks the old `~/.shell/config.yaml` location — this task adopts the family convention as-is. If a migration path is wanted, that is separate follow-up work; flag it to the user rather than scope-creeping this card.

**Subtasks:**
- [x] Add the `FoundationModelsExtras` dependency to `Package.swift` and confirm `swift build` resolves it
- [x] Rewire `defaultUserConfigURL()` / `defaultProjectConfigURL()` through `DotfolderStack(name: "shell", ...)`
- [x] Update `ShellPolicy.swift` header/doc comments to describe the XDG-based user layer (keep doc coverage green)
- [x] Add `ShellPolicyTests` cases for stack-derived defaults, including an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override case
- [x] Run the full suite and the `DocCoverageTests` gate

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] `ShellTool` links `FoundationModelsExtras` and `ShellPolicy` contains no hand-rolled `".shell/config.yaml"` string composition for the user layer (the literal `shellConfigFileName` constant is gone; paths come from `DotfolderStack` layer roots)
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` resolves to `~/.config/shell/config.yaml` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is unset, and to `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/shell/config.yaml` when it is set to an absolute path — matching `DotfolderStack`'s documented XDG resolution
- [x] `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` still resolves to `{git_root}/.shell/config.yaml` (or `nil` outside a git tree) — unchanged, since the project layer was not affected by the XDG change
- [x] Public API of `ShellPolicy` is unchanged: `init(userConfigURL:projectConfigURL:warn:)`, both default-path helpers keep their signatures, and no existing test file other than `ShellPolicyTests.swift` needs modification
- [x] The embedded builtin deny list remains in effect with no overlay files present (existing `missingConfigFilesLeaveBuiltinRulesInEffect` test still passes)
- [x] `swift test` passes, including `DocCoverageTests` (any new/changed `public` declarations are documented)

## Tests

- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultUserConfigURLDerivesFromXDGConfigHome` asserting `ShellPolicy.defaultUserConfigURL()` equals `FileManager.default.homeDirectoryForCurrentUser.appendingPathComponent(".config/shell/config.yaml")` when `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` is not set in the environment passed to the stack
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add a case proving an `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` override is honored (construct the underlying `DotfolderStack` directly with a fake environment dictionary, since `ShellPolicy`'s own `init` takes no `environment:` parameter — assert the `.user` layer root equals `<XDG_CONFIG_HOME>/shell`)
- [x] In `Tests/ShellToolTests/ShellPolicyTests.swift`: add `defaultProjectConfigURLResolvesGitRootShellFolder` asserting that (running inside this repo) `ShellPolicy.defaultProjectConfigURL()` ends with `.shell/config.yaml` and its directory contains a `.git` entry
- [x] Full regression: `swift test` from the package root exits 0 with all existing `ShellPolicyTests` (stacking, permit/deny, settings precedence) unchanged and passing
